titleStmt.title: SII 23.383: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 383. (A.R. No. 383 of 1907.) Māyūram, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Pañchanadēśvara temple—on the same wall Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III: year 25: 1201-02 A.D.

summary.p: This bears the same short introduction and details of date as Nos. 380 and 381 above. It records a gift of a hundred kalam of paddy per year due to the mahā-sabhā of [Rājēn]dra-chaturvēdimaṅgalam as iṟai (for sabhā-viṉiyōgam) from Maṅgalaṅkiḻāṉ Āṇḍukoṇḍān Amudāḻvāṉ a veḷḷāḷa landlord of the place on his land, to the temple of Tiruvaiyāṟuḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravat
tikaḷ maturaiyum Īḻamuṅ ka
ruvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyu
ṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulottu
ṅka coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu [2 10 5]
vatu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattucatur
puṇarpūcattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭaco
ḻavaḷaṉāṭṭut tiruveḻuntūrṉāṭṭu ku
lottuṅkacoḻaṉ kuṟṟālattu Uṭai
yār tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyār koyil Āti
caṇṭecuratevarkku Iṉṉāṭṭu brama
teyan tiraccarup pe
timaṅkalattu mahā sabhaiyārum I
vvūr veḷḷāṉ kāṇiyāḷarum Ivvaṉai
vom Iṉṉāyaṉār Iṟ
ṟaināḷāl nirvārttu Iṟaiyili ce
yta nilamāvatu Ivvūril sabhaip potuvā
y niṅkalukku Uṭalāy
ṇiyākak koṇṭu payiṟceytu taram
iṭṭu yiṟuttu varukiṟa nilattu nel
lāy nāṅkaḷ sabhāviṉiyokattu
kku Uṭalākak koṇṭu varukiṟa nellil I
ṉṉāyanārkku Irupattaiñcāvatu pacāṉa mutal
Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta taram peṟṟa nila
m Araiye Irumāvarai yiṉnilam Araiye
yirumāvaraiyiṉāl tarappaṭi nellu nūṟṟu
kkalam Iṉnel nūṟṟukkalamum Irupat
taiñcāvatu pacāṉa mutal Iṟaiyili ceytu
kuṭuttom Ivvaṉaivom Iṉṉilamum ne
llum Iṉṉāyanārkku cantirātittavaṟ Iṟai
yiliyākac ceytu kuṭuttom Ivvaṉaivom
Iṉnellu nūṟṟukkalamum Iṟukkum Iṭattu
Eṅkaḷūril veḷḷāṉ kāṇiyāḷaril maṅkalaṅ
kiḻāṉ Āṇṭukoṇṭāṉ Amutāḻvāṉ
kāṇiyāy Ivaṉperil taram Iṭṭu Iṟuttu
varukiṟa nilattile Innilam Araiye yirumā
varaiyiṉāl tarappaṭi nellu nūṟṟukkalamum Iṟai
yiliyākak kaḻittu yinnāyana
nārkku Iṟukkakkaṭavaṉāka yicaintu Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭut
tom Uṭaiyār tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyār koyil Āticaṇṭe
śvaratevarkku Ivvaṉaivom paṇiyāl Ivai Ūr kaṇakku .
Digital edition of SII 23.383 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
